-    s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_DGRAM)
     try:
-        s.connect(("8.8.8.8", 80))
-        ip = s.getsockname()[0]
+        # Create a UDP socket
+        s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_DGRAM)
+        # Connect to an external address (doesn't have to be reachable)

+        ip_address = s.getsockname()[0]
+        s.close()
+        return ip_address
     except Exception:
-        ip = "127.0.0.1"
-    finally:
-        s.close()
-    return ip
+        return "Unable to determine IP. Ensure you are connected to a network."

         "rssiThreshold": 5,
         "heartbeatMs": 10000,
         "scanIntervalMs": 100
     }), 200
+    
+@app.route("/camera/frame")
+def camera_frame():
+    global camera
+
+    if not camera.isOpened():
+        camera = cv2.VideoCapture(CAMERA_URL)
+
+    success, frame = camera.read()
+
+    if not success:
+        return jsonify({"error": "Unable to read frame"}), 500
+
+    _, buffer = cv2.imencode(".jpg", frame)
+
+    return Response(
+        buffer.tobytes(),
+        mimetype="image/jpeg",
+        headers={
+            "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*"
+        }
+    )
 if __name__ == "__main__":
     app.run(host="0.0.0.0", port=SERVER_PORT, debug=True)

@@ -10,10 +10,30 @@
 camera = cv2.VideoCapture(CAMERA_URL)
 # In-memory store: deviceId -> latest device state
 devices = {}
 
+def generate_frames():
+    global camera
 
+    while True:
+        if not camera.isOpened():
+            camera = cv2.VideoCapture(CAMERA_URL)
 
+        success, frame = camera.read()
+
+        if not success:
+            continue
+
+        _, buffer = cv2.imencode(".jpg", frame)
+        frame_bytes = buffer.tobytes()
+
+        yield (
+            b'--frame\r\n'
+            b'Content-Type: image/jpeg\r\n\r\n' +
+            frame_bytes +
+            b'\r\n'
+        )
+
 def now_str():
     return datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

+def stream():
+    def generate():
+        with requests.get(CAMERA_URL, stream=True) as r:
+            for chunk in r.iter_content(chunk_size=1024):
+                if chunk:
+                    yield chunk
+
+    return Response(generate(), mimetype="multipart/x-mixed-replace; boundary=frame")
 if __name__ == "__main__":
     app.run(host="0.0.0.0", port=SERVER_PORT, debug=True)
